title: POI Marker entry in the Layers panel
capture_instructions: Left sidebar is open on the Layers tab. The layers list shows the Queens Campus (Segmented) point cloud entry and, below it, a 'POI Marker' entry. The POI Marker row should display an eye (visibility) icon. If the three-dot context menu icon is visible on hover, hover the mouse over the POI Marker row to reveal it. Viewport shows the point cloud in background.
ui_state: Layers tab open in sidebar, POI Marker row visible, mouse hovering the POI Marker row

annotations.label: Three-dot context menu (Delete POI and other actions)
